triggers.name: set_timestamp
triggers.body: CREATE TRIGGER set_timestamp BEFORE UPDATE ON quotes.quote FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION common.trigger_set_timestamp()

triggers.name: insert_product_rows_trigger
triggers.body: CREATE TRIGGER insert_product_rows_trigger AFTER INSERT ON quotes.quote_rows FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION quotes.update_kit_product_rows()

triggers.name: update_kit_product_rows_trigger
triggers.body: CREATE TRIGGER update_kit_product_rows_trigger AFTER UPDATE OF kit_id ON quotes.quote_rows FOR EACH ROW WHEN ((old.kit_id IS DISTINCT FROM new.kit_id)) EXECUTE FUNCTION quotes.update_kit_product_rows()

triggers.name: trigger_update_quote_row_totals
triggers.body: CREATE TRIGGER trigger_update_quote_row_totals AFTER INSERT OR DELETE OR UPDATE ON quotes.quote_rows_products FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION quotes.update_quote_row_totals()

views.name: v_quote_rows_for_hs
views.definition:
SELECT qr.id, qr.quote_id, qr.kit_id, COALESCE(common.get_short_translation(k.translation_uuid, 'it'::character varying), k.internal_name) AS translation_it, COALESCE(common.get_short_translation(k.translation_uuid, 'en'::character varying), k.internal_name) AS translation_en, qr.internal_name, qr.nrc_row, qr.mrc_row, qr.bundle_prefix_row, qr.hs_line_item_id, ( SELECT string_agg(((((('[n. '::text || (x.quantity)::text) || '] '::text) || (x.translation_it)::text) || ''::text) || x.extended_description), ('
'::character varying)::text) AS string_agg FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(common.get_short_translation(p.translation_uuid, 'it'::character varying), p.internal_name) AS translation_it, qrp.quantity, qrp.extended_description FROM (quotes.quote_rows_products qrp JOIN products.product p ON (((qrp.product_code)::text = (p.code)::text))) WHERE ((qrp.quote_row_id = qr.id) AND (qrp.included = true)) ORDER BY qrp.quote_row_id, qrp.main_product DESC, qrp."position") x) AS descrizione_estesa, ( SELECT string_agg(((((('[n. '::text || (x.quantity)::text) || '] '::text) || (x.translation_en)::text) || ''::text) || x.extended_description), ('
'::character varying)::text) AS string_agg FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(common.get_short_translation(p.translation_uuid, 'en'::character varying), p.internal_name) AS translation_en, qrp.quantity, qrp.extended_description FROM (quotes.quote_rows_products qrp JOIN products.product p ON (((qrp.product_code)::text = (p.code)::text))) WHERE ((qrp.quote_row_id = qr.id) AND (qrp.included = true)) ORDER BY qrp.quote_row_id, qrp.main_product DESC, qrp."position") x) AS descrizione_estesa_en FROM (quotes.quote_rows qr JOIN products.kit k ON ((qr.kit_id = k.id)));

views.name: v_quote_rows_products
views.definition:
WITH list_of_rows AS (
         SELECT qrp.id,
            qrp.product_code,
            p.internal_name,
            qrp.minimum,
            qrp.maximum,
            qrp.required,
            qrp.nrc,
            qrp.mrc,
            qrp."position",
            qrp.group_name,
            qrp.included,
            qrp.main_product,
            qrp.quantity,
            qrp.extended_description,
            qrp.quote_row_id
           FROM (quotes.quote_rows_products qrp
             JOIN products.product p ON (((qrp.product_code)::text = (p.code)::text)))
          ORDER BY qrp.quote_row_id, qrp.main_product DESC, qrp."position"
        )
 SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF((group_name)::text, ''::text), (internal_name)::text) AS group_name,
    quote_row_id,
    json_agg(json_build_object('id', id, 'product_code', product_code, 'product_name', internal_name, 'minimum', minimum, 'maximum', maximum, 'required', required, 'nrc', nrc, 'mrc', mrc, 'position', "position", 'group_name', group_name, 'included', included, 'main_product', main_product, 'quantity', quantity, 'extended_description', extended_description)) AS riga,
    count(0) AS conta,
    max((required)::integer) AS required,
    max((main_product)::integer) AS main_product,
    max("position") AS "position"
   FROM list_of_rows
  GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF((group_name)::text, ''::text), (internal_name)::text), quote_row_id
  ORDER BY quote_row_id, (max((main_product)::integer)) DESC, (max("position"));

functions.name: ins_quote_head
upd_quote_head
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION quotes.upd_quote_head(json_data json)
 RETURNS json
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    v_updated json;
    v_id integer;
		v_contacts json;
BEGIN
    IF json_data ->> 'id' IS NULL THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Missing required field: id';
    END IF;

    v_id = (json_data ->> 'id')::integer;

/*    -- Verify that v_id is valued and the quote exists, otherwise raise an exception
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM quotes.quote WHERE id = v_id) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Quote with id % does not exist', v_id;
    END IF;
*/

    IF json_data ->> 'hs_esign_contacts' IS NOT NULL THEN
        v_contacts = json_data ->> 'hs_esign_contacts';
    END IF;

    /*
    add rif_ordcli varchar(240)
        , add rif_tech_nom varchar(240)
        , add rif_tech_tel varchar(240)
        , add rif_tech_email varchar(240)
        , add rif_altro_tech_nom varchar(240)
        , add rif_altro_tech_tel varchar(240)
        , add rif_altro_tech_email varchar(240)
        , add rif_adm_nom varchar(240)
        , add rif_adm_tech_tel varchar(240)
        , add rif_adm_tech_email varchar(240);
            
     */

    UPDATE quotes.quote SET
                            quote_number = json_data ->> 'quote_number',
                            customer_id = (json_data ->> 'customer_id')::bigint,
                            ragione_sociale = json_data ->> 'ragione_sociale',
                            deal_number = json_data ->> 'deal_number',
                            owner = json_data ->> 'owner',
                            document_date = (json_data ->> 'document_date')::date,
                            document_type = json_data ->> 'document_type',
                            replace_orders = json_data ->> 'replace_orders',
                            template = json_data ->> 'template',
                            services = json_data ->> 'services',
                            proposal_type = json_data ->> 'proposal_type',
                            initial_term_months = (json_data ->> 'initial_term_months')::integer,
                            next_term_months = (json_data ->> 'next_term_months')::integer,
                            bill_months = (json_data ->> 'bill_months')::integer,
                            delivered_in_days = (json_data ->> 'delivered_in_days')::smallint,
                            date_sent = (json_data ->> 'date_sent')::date,
                            status = json_data ->> 'status',
                            notes = json_data ->> 'notes',
                            nrc_charge_time = (json_data ->> 'nrc_charge_time')::integer,
                            description = json_data ->> 'description',
                            payment_method = json_data ->> 'payment_method',
                            hs_esign_enabled = (json_data ->> 'hs_esign_enabled')::boolean,
                            hs_esign_contacts = v_contacts,
                            rif_ordcli = json_data ->> 'rif_ordcli',
                            rif_tech_nom = json_data ->> 'rif_tech_nom',
                            rif_tech_tel = json_data ->> 'rif_tech_tel',
                            rif_tech_email = json_data ->> 'rif_tech_email',
                            rif_altro_tech_nom = json_data ->> 'rif_altro_tech_nom',
                            rif_altro_tech_tel = json_data ->> 'rif_altro_tech_tel',
                            rif_altro_tech_email = json_data ->> 'rif_altro_tech_email',
                            rif_adm_nom = json_data ->> 'rif_adm_nom',
                            rif_adm_tech_tel = json_data ->> 'rif_adm_tech_tel',
                            rif_adm_tech_email = json_data ->> 'rif_adm_tech_email'
                        

    WHERE id = v_id;

    -- Check if the update was successful
    IF NOT FOUND THEN
        v_updated = json_build_object('status', 'ERROR', 'message', 'Update failed')::json;
        RETURN v_updated;
    END IF;

    v_updated = json_build_object('status', 'OK', 'message', 'Update successful')::json;
    RETURN v_updated;
EXCEPTION
    WHEN OTHERS THEN
        -- Handle any other exceptions
        v_updated = json_build_object('status', 'ERROR', 'message', SQLERRM)::json;
        RETURN v_updated;
END;
$function$

functions.name: upd_quote_row_product
update_kit_product_rows
update_quote_customer_from_erp
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION quotes.update_quote_customer_from_erp()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
DECLARE
    erp_client loader.erp_anagrafiche_clienti%ROWTYPE;
BEGIN
    -- Recupera i dati dal record corrispondente in erp_anagrafiche_clienti
    SELECT * INTO erp_client
    FROM loader.erp_anagrafiche_clienti
    WHERE numero_azienda = NEW.customer_id;

    -- Controlla se esiste già un record in quote_customer per questa quote
    IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM quotes.quote_customer WHERE quote_id = NEW.id) THEN
        -- Aggiorna il record esistente in quote_customer usando i dati da erp_anagrafiche_clienti
        UPDATE quotes.quote_customer
        SET
            codice_fiscale = erp_client.codice_fiscale,
            partita_iva = erp_client.partita_iva,
            lingua = erp_client.lingua,
            codice_sdi = erp_client.codice_sdi,
            indirizzo_fatturazione = erp_client.indirizzo_fatturazione,
            citta_fatturazione = erp_client.citta_fatturazione,
            provincia_fatturazione = erp_client.provincia_fatturazione,
            cap_fatturazione = erp_client.cap_fatturazione,
            paese_fatturazione = erp_client.paese_fatturazione,
            metodo_pagamento = erp_client.metodo_pagamento
        WHERE quote_id = NEW.id;
    ELSE
        -- Inserisce un nuovo record in quote_customer usando i dati da erp_anagrafiche_clienti
        INSERT INTO quotes.quote_customer (
            quote_id,
            codice_fiscale,
            partita_iva,
            lingua,
            codice_sdi,
            indirizzo_fatturazione,
            citta_fatturazione,
            provincia_fatturazione,
            cap_fatturazione,
            paese_fatturazione,
            metodo_pagamento
        ) VALUES (
                     NEW.id,
                     erp_client.codice_fiscale,
                     erp_client.partita_iva,
                     erp_client.lingua,
                     erp_client.codice_sdi,
                     erp_client.indirizzo_fatturazione,
                     erp_client.citta_fatturazione,
                     erp_client.provincia_fatturazione,
                     erp_client.cap_fatturazione,
                     erp_client.paese_fatturazione,
                     erp_client.metodo_pagamento
                 );
    END IF;

    -- Ritorna il record modificato
    RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$

functions.name: update_quote_row_totals
functions.definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION quotes.update_quote_row_totals()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    -- Determinare l'ID della quote_row interessata (diverso a seconda dell'evento)
    DECLARE
v_quote_row_id INT;
BEGIN
        IF TG_OP = 'DELETE' THEN
            v_quote_row_id := OLD.quote_row_id;
ELSE
            v_quote_row_id := NEW.quote_row_id;
END IF;

        -- Aggiornamento dei totali nella tabella quote_rows
UPDATE quotes.quote_rows
SET nrc_row = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(nrc * quantity), 0)
               FROM quotes.quote_rows_products
               WHERE quote_row_id = v_quote_row_id and included = true),
    mrc_row = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(mrc * quantity), 0)
               FROM quotes.quote_rows_products
               WHERE quote_row_id = v_quote_row_id and included = true)
WHERE id = v_quote_row_id;

RETURN NEW;
END;
END;
$function$
